vllm.title: Fix detokenization leaving special tokens
vllm.author: Yard1
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Turns out skip_special_tokens is not respected if input to convert_ids_to_tokens is an int instead of a list.
@HermitSun this should fix the issue you mentioned here

vllm.title: Add pandas to requirements.txt
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Closes #754
When I tried inference with TP, I got a message like:
ValueError: Ray is not installed. Please install Ray to use distributed serving.

although I've already installed Ray.
This turned out be due to the following error in importing Ray data:
 File "/home/wskwon/anaconda3/envs/test-ray/li

vllm.title: OpenAI-Server: Only fail if logit_bias has actual values
vllm.author: LLukas22
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Many OpenAI wrappers of popular libraries such as langchain or haystack will always append an empty dictionary as a logit_bias value to their requests. Currently the server will return an error in these cases. I think the server should only error out if logit_bias actually contains any values and pr

vllm.title: Fix warning message on LLaMA FastTokenizer
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The warning message is for the LLaMA V1 model, and does not hold for all LLaMA variants. The PR clarifies that it is for LLaMA V1.

vllm.title: Abort when coroutine is cancelled
vllm.author: rucyang
vllm.bodyExcerpt: There is a scene, while running async for result in AsyncLLMEngine.generate(...)，if caller cancel the coroutine at high level (ex. Sanic Framework cancel the coroutine which handling request when transport connection is disconnected), whether to need catching asyncio.CancelledError  and aborting  to
